title: schefflera affinis
intro: Schefflera affinis, also known as the Yellow Bird's Nest, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine where it is used to treat various ailments due to its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Schefflera affinis include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a decoction or a tincture, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
